caption: A man with glasses and a tall, grey, textured wig sits in a studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He wears black headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and several clothing items, including a black vest on a mannequin and a "LEE" branded garment. On-screen logos include a graphic with the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST." As the scene progresses, the man maintains his position and continues speaking, with slight movements of his head and mouth as he articulates his words. The camera remains stationary, capturing his upper body from the chest up against the detailed backdrop of the studio.
